name: Sardis
description: Payment infrastructure for AI agents. Spending mandates, non-custodial wallets, policy enforcement, multi-rail execution.

capabilities.name: payments
capabilities.description: Execute payments on behalf of AI agents with policy enforcement

capabilities.name: mandates
capabilities.description: Create and manage spending mandates — scoped, revocable payment authorization

capabilities.name: wallets
capabilities.description: Create and manage non-custodial MPC wallets

capabilities.name: policies
capabilities.description: Define and enforce natural language spending policies

capabilities.name: agents
capabilities.description: Register and manage AI agent identities

capabilities.name: approvals
capabilities.description: Human-in-the-loop approval workflows for high-value transactions

capabilities.name: cards
capabilities.description: Issue virtual cards for agent payments

authentication.description: API key (sk_test_ or sk_live_) as Bearer token
